news.title: Sebi approves IPOs of Bombay Coated, Bonfiglioli Transmissions and Swaraj Green Power
news.description: Sebi has approved IPO proposals of Bombay Coated and Special Steels, Bonfiglioli Transmissions and Swaraj Green Power and Fuel. The approvals underscore sustained momentum in India’s primary market, with investors showing strong interest across manufacturing, industrial and renewable energy sectors.

news.title: Rupee rallies as oil slump sparks unwinding of dollar longs
news.description: The Indian rupee experienced a robust uptick against the dollar on Friday, sparked by newfound optimism regarding peace talks between the U.S. and Iran. This positive development resulted in a sharp decrease in oil prices, alleviating some of the pressure on India’s import expenses.

news.title: Fund of Funds explained: Meaning, types, benefits and limitations you must know
news.description: Fund of Funds (FoFs) are a type of mutual fund that does not invest directly in stocks, bonds, or other asset classes. Instead, they invest in other mutual fund schemes or just track an ETF or index fund.
